criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Availability and sophistication of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, AI-generated music, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech reviews

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: Size and diversity of the music library available on the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech reviews

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of premium subscription plans, if applicable.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, developer websites

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Unique features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech reviews

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other services and platforms (e.g., social media, smart home devices).
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech reviews

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, developer websites
